chips.text: no acute confusion reported if applicable
no unexplained falls reported if applicable
medication review documented if clinician reviewed
formal cognitive assessment arranged if clinician decided
driving advice documented if clinician discussed
carer support needs discussed if relevant
previous cognitive testing reviewed if available
driving safety discussed if clinician raised concern

speed_preset.text: no acute confusion reported if applicable

history_draft.text: Patient presents with memory concern: onset [onset], progression [progression]. Domains affected: [domains]. ADL impact: [ADL]. [Mood/sleep context]. [Collateral history]. [Additional history].

exam_prompts.text: Documented if assessed or measured. Blood pressure documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Cognitive screening (e.g. MMSE, MoCA) documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Neurological screen documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Mood screening documented.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered B12 reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Thyroid function reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered CBC reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Liver function reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Brain imaging report reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Previous cognitive assessment report reviewed.

clinical_blockers: Children and memory concerns outside suspected dementia are outside the exact source.

Head trauma, focal symptoms, falls, acute behaviour wording, blood pressure, ECG, specific individual laboratory tests, imaging, generic safety-netting, generic clinician plans, and fixed follow-up remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, cognitive interpretation, driving decisions, referral, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
